# GREENHOMESNW

> UK sustainable home energy company. MCS-certified solar panels and air source heat pumps across England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland.

## About

GREENHOMESNW (Green Homes NW Ltd) installs MCS-certified solar PV and air source heat pumps for UK homeowners. Founded 2009. Registered address: 71-75 Shelton Street, London WC2H 9JQ, England.

## Core services (UK)

- Solar panel installation (MCS certified, DNO applications, SEG export payments in Great Britain)
- Air source heat pumps (MCS certified, BUS in England & Wales, Home Energy Scotland routes)

## UK regulations and schemes

- Smart Export Guarantee (SEG): export payments for MCS solar in England, Scotland, Wales
- Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS): heat pump grants in England and Wales (eligibility applies)
- Home Energy Scotland: grants and loans for Scottish households
- EPC / MEES: solar can improve EPC ratings for UK landlords
- Building Regulations and Part P apply to UK installs

## UK locations served

London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Glasgow, Edinburgh, Bristol, Liverpool, Sheffield, Newcastle, Nottingham, Cardiff, Belfast, Southampton, Leicester, Brighton, Reading, Oxford, Cambridge, Aberdeen.

Location pages: https://greenhomesnw.co.uk/locations/{city-slug}

- Tagline: Smart Energy. Sustainable Living.
- Currency: GBP (£). Typical UK solar savings: £400 to £900 per year (usage and system size dependent)
